headline: BMO Capital Begins Coverage of Dover (DOV), Highlights Margin Strength and Growth Exposure
summary: Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) is included among the 13 Best Diversified Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 27, BMO Capital initiated coverage of Dover Corporation (NYSE:DOV) with a Market Perform rating and a $237 price target. The analyst said the company has improved its portfolio mix over the past five years, built a strong […]
